profile_backed_target.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- --quiet

lever.description: Route batched-operand gather through a segmented row-major copy path when axis-0 gather slices are size 1, avoiding per-batch slice/eval/stack fallback.

after.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_gather --quiet

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Preserved: the direct path visits batch lanes in axis-0 order, then index literals in row-major order, then slice elements in the same row-major order as fj-lax eval_gather.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: Not applicable: gather is read-only selection with no duplicate-write arbitration.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Preserved bit-for-bit: the lever copies Literal values and performs no arithmetic, reassociation, comparison, rounding, or dtype conversion.
isomorphism_proof.rng: Not applicable: gather has no RNG state or seed consumption.
isomorphism_proof.out_of_bounds: Preserved: clip/promise clamp to the final per-lane row and fill/drop emits the same dtype fill literal as fj-lax eval_gather.
isomorphism_proof.fallbacks: Unsupported gather modes, incompatible slice sizes, scalar operands, rank-1 batched operands, empty gather dimensions, and mismatched batch sizes stay on the existing fallback.

completed.command: rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-dispatch gather -- --nocapture
completed.result: passed; 6 gather unit tests and 3 dispatch-suite gather tests
passed; 243 lib tests, 55 dispatch-suite tests, 0 doctests

completed.command: rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-dispatch --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings
rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_gather --quiet
